subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-15 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: True significance lies in states of spirituality. Should you all be captivated by the sweet savours of spirituality, then I shall always be with you
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهمیت در حالات و شئون روحانی است اگر شما منجذب بنفحات روحانی باشید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
